violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Per PIC, new ice machine is going to be installed by tomorrow. Proper cleaning frequency discussed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be washed rinsed and sanitized end of day. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

A small amount of rodent droppings were observed behind the chest freezers in the dry storage area. Droppings to be cleaned. Area to be monitored for new droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Various foods were observed held at 42-45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Ice was added to the unit to help maintain food temperature as a temporary fix. Refrigeration was called. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023

Mouse droppings were observed in the back storage area. PIC to inquire about/contact pest control for the building. The establishment shall be cleaned/monitored for rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023
The prep unit was not recovering temperature adequately. Unit to be serviced. Ice may be used to help maintain food temperatures temporarily. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023
